body.title: Granny CC.0 dispatch: docstring says bus, code says tmux_send_keys — fake completion
body.intention: I intend that Granny's CC.0 dispatch config and its docstring agree, and that the dispatch path either delivers the handshake or honestly documents that it does not.
body.description:
GURU / AKIEN DECISION — held, not for auto-sprint (needs judgment, not Haiku).

[REDACTED-CREDENTIAL]'s build tickets are all closed (T-shim-dispatch-handshake, T-cc-worker-idle-listener, T-granny-flip-bus-cc) but the flip is a fake completion: devices/granny/daemon.py _default_config() (~line 86) sets CC.0 dispatch='tmux_send_keys' while the module docstring (~lines 16-18) claims dispatch='bus, mailbox: cc.0'. Live Granny still raw send-keys /sprint-ticket (the 2026-06-05 re-dispatch barrage proves it), so the ack->started->timeout handshake NEVER runs for CC.0.

Deeper question for Akien: bus dispatch assumes CC runs an IDLE listener to receive the envelope — but CC.0 is an interactive tmux session, not a daemon. Whatever receives the envelope still bottoms out in send-keys to claude-main. So bus may not be the right model for interactive CC at all.

Decide between: (a) actually flip CC.0 to bus AND verify end-to-end that a dispatched envelope causes /sprint-ticket to run with an ack recorded; or (b) accept the pragmatic handshake shipped 2026-06-05 (worker=claude busy-check in _cc0_busy + CC.0.available.false gate during compact) as the real mechanism for interactive CC, and correct the lying docstring to match.

**Affected files:** devices/granny/daemon.py (docstring and/or _default_config), possibly devices/claude/ IDLE listener wiring
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** The decision + the chosen wiring + making docstring and code agree. Out of scope: the compaction-cadence work.
**Completion criteria:** daemon.py docstring and _default_config() agree on CC.0 dispatch kind. If bus chosen: an end-to-end test shows a dispatched envelope causes /sprint-ticket to run and an ack to be recorded. If tmux retained: docstring states the pragmatic handshake (busy-check + availability gate) and why bus was not used for interactive CC.
